    linux.4: clarify path translation

    Try to be a little more explicit about the path translation mechanism
    accessing /compat/linux/<path> then falling back to /<path>.

    PR:             277804
    Reviewed by:    fernape
    Sponsored by:   The FreeBSD Foundation
